findings.location: s2 — Ant Javadocタスクの設定方法 code example
findings.description: The knowledge file's code example shows only the `<javadoc>` block, omitting the preceding `<path id="lib.path">` definition that configures the required classpath (nablarch.jar, nablarch-toolbox.jar, tools.jar). This definition is what makes `pathref="lib.path"` in the doclet tag work and is part of the tool's required configuration.
findings.source_evidence: Source includes: `<path id="lib.path"><pathelement location="main/web/WEB-INF/lib/nablarch.jar" /><pathelement location="tool_lib/nablarch-toolbox.jar" /><pathelement location="tool_lib/tools.jar" /></path>` before the `<javadoc>` block, with a note that the example shows only the settings required for this tool.

findings.description: The source 使用方法 H2 section exceeds 2000 characters of plain text and contains an H3 subsection (Ant Javadocタスクの設定方法), but the knowledge file merges both into a single section s2 without creating a separate s3 for the Ant subsection.
findings.source_evidence: Source headings: H2 '使用方法' (large section with argument tables, output target rules, etc.) followed by H3 'Ant Javadocタスクの設定方法' (its own configuration table and full code example).
